reasoning: The price has encountered significant resistance at the Macro Value Area High (VAH) near 72,636. The 15m chart displays a clear exhaustion wick above 73,000, suggesting a liquidity sweep of late breakout buyers. With the price overextended from the Point of Control (POC) at 71,226.63 and forming a narrowing ascending channel (rising wedge), a mean-reversion move toward the POC is highly probable. Declining volume on the latest push and peaking Open Interest suggest a 'long squeeze' scenario is imminent as the market seeks liquidity at the high-volume node (POC).
reasoning_zh: 价格在突破73,000后形成衰竭影线，并在宏观VAH（72,636）处受阻，显示出明显的流动性扫荡特征。15分钟图上的上升楔形伴随成交量萎缩，预示动能衰竭。基于成交量分布原理，价格极大概率向POC（71,226.63）进行均值回归。结合持仓量（OI）处于高位及散户多头情绪过热，市场存在‘多头挤压’风险，回踩价值区中心POC是目前最高概率的走势。
